published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML and ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022Riesz: standard AIPW/DML and Riesz representation for weighted/local treatment-effect functionals

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v2 is adjacent failed DML/Riesz report-comparison frontier, but not this shrinking local HTE critical-radius trichotomy

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022Riesz covers local functionals with diverging operator/Riesz norm and Gaussian approximation, but not a necessary-and-sufficient three-channel C_n frontier with lower-bound witnesses
KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE: Holder CATE minimax elbows and local-polynomial R-learner rates; this exponent witness is mostly algebraic specialization of Conjecture 1

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparator claims cite ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022Riesz and ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022AutoDML without section/equation/page anchors to the exact local-Riesz gap; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until anchored.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The Holder exponent witness cites KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE and ArmstrongKolesar2021FiniteSampleATE by bibkey only, with no location-level anchor showing the precise bandwidth/product-rate gap.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claim A_n(P)^2 asymp sup_h mu_{r_n,h}(P)^{-1} needs a uniform L2/L1 comparability or nonnegative bounded-away report-modifier condition on h; bounded entropy and positive denominator alone do not imply it.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add exact location anchors for the closest comparators: e.g. Chernozhukov-Newey-Singh 2022 Riesz Section 2 local functionals/operator norm and the theorem/corollary giving Gaussian approximation, then state precisely which missing necessity channel C_n supplies.
Repair Theorem 1 by adding an assumption such as uniform nonnegative h with E[h^2 | local]/E[h | local]^2 bounded above and below, or weaken the conclusion to the exact L2 expression for A_n.

Promote Conjecture 2 above algebra by tying beta to Holder smoothness exponents s_m,s_e,d_z through named local estimators and showing the boundary is not already a Kennedy-style oracle/product-rate corollary.

recommended_next_step: Revise locally: add location-level prior-art anchors and fix the missing report-modifier comparability condition before another Stage -0.5 pass.
